summary: Use c.GetNoCache (not the cached c.Get) in pollReportOperation so the report poll loop is not pinned to a stale 'done:false' snapshot by the 5-min HTTP cache TTL; and pass the resolved networkCode (not the raw --network flag) to loadEntityRows in 'since' so env-var-only network selection still prefix-filters the local mirror.
reason: Both flagged P1 during library review (PR #1243): the cached GET would lock report run/rerun/watch until cache expiry, and 'since' with only GOOGLE_AD_MANAGER_NETWORK_CODE set (no --network flag) would emit changes for every network in the mirror, not just the refreshed one.
validated_outcome: go build clean; report polling fetches fresh operation status each interval; 'since' filters mirror rows to the resolved network prefix.
